/**
 * src/components/LeadForm.jsx
 *
 * Inline lead collection form, shown when the chat backend sets collect_lead=true.
 * Collects: name, email, org (optional), interest.
 *
 * Props:
 *   language   : "ar" | "en"
 *   onSubmit   : (lead: object) => Promise<void>
 *   onDismiss  : () => void
 */import{useState}from"react";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const LABELS={ar:{title:"تواصل مع فريقنا",name:"الاسم",email:"البريد الإلكتروني",org:"المؤسسة (اختياري)",interest:"موضع الاهتمام",submit:"إرسال",dismiss:"لاحقاً"},en:{title:"Get in touch",name:"Name",email:"Email",org:"Organisation (optional)",interest:"Topic of interest",submit:"Submit",dismiss:"Maybe later"}};export default function LeadForm(_ref){let{language="ar",onSubmit,onDismiss}=_ref;const L=LABELS[language]||LABELS.ar;const[fields,setFields]=useState({name:"",email:"",org:"",interest:""});const[submitting,setSubmitting]=useState(false);const[done,setDone]=useState(false);const set=key=>e=>setFields(prev=>({...prev,[key]:e.target.value}));const handleSubmit=async e=>{e.preventDefault();if(!fields.name||!fields.email)return;setSubmitting(true);try{await onSubmit({...fields,language});setDone(true);}finally{setSubmitting(false);}};if(done){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"lead-form",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"lead-form__title",children:language==="ar"?"شكراً! سيتواصل معك فريقنا قريباً.":"Thanks! Our team will be in touch soon."})});}return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{className:"lead-form",onSubmit:handleSubmit,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"lead-form__title",children:L.title}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"lead-form__row",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{className:"lead-form__input",placeholder:L.name,value:fields.name,onChange:set("name"),required:true}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{className:"lead-form__input",type:"email",placeholder:L.email,value:fields.email,onChange:set("email"),required:true})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{className:"lead-form__input",placeholder:L.org,value:fields.org,onChange:set("org")}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{className:"lead-form__input",placeholder:L.interest,value:fields.interest,onChange:set("interest")}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"lead-form__submit",type:"submit",disabled:submitting,children:L.submit}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"button",className:"lead-form__dismiss",onClick:onDismiss,children:L.dismiss})]});}
